__fixture__.name: docs_pack_refresh_deferred_stale_examples
__fixture__.scenario: A stale-example detector fired after the docs-pack refresh window closed. The guided step is suppressed, the generated example is labeled stale on the primary surface, and a paired late-copy packet carries the corrected Help/About wording. The packet carries impacted docs-pack refs, a support-runbook update, and a successor reviewed-pack target.

rationale: Two stale-example detectors fired on the rc2 docs pack after the refresh window closed: a guided step references a command whose descriptor moved, and a generated example was produced against a prior generator contract. The refresh cannot ride this train; the detectors' declared actions (suppress_from_surface, label_stale_with_reason) apply, and the Help/About wording rides a paired late-copy packet. This packet carries the proof gap until the successor reviewed pack cuts.

impacted_claim_rows.narrowing_note: Docs-freshness claim narrows to limited for the rc2 docs pack while two example surfaces carry the detector-declared suppression and stale-label actions.

impacted_docs_packs.narrowing_note: Pack remains publishable under the narrowed claim. Two example_summary entries flip: one to suppress_from_surface, one to stale_example with generator_contract_mismatch.

degraded_wording_surfaces.degraded_text_preview: Guided step held while the docs pack refresh publishes the matching command entry.
Docs freshness disclosure rendered as preview-unverified until the successor docs pack lands.
Support export header names the preview state and the rerun eta.

support_impact.narrative: Support runbook macro for docs-freshness questions answers with the narrowed wording and points operators to the successor docs pack eta. The runbook keeps local-only paths unaffected.

required_reviewers.notes: Narrowed wording matches the detector-declared actions; no widening of the docs-freshness claim.
Accepted for rc2 under the narrowed claim; successor docs-pack cut planned.
Refresh blocked by generator contract regen; successor pack will land before expiry.
Runbook macro updated; no support hold required.

rollback_or_reversal.notes: If the successor docs pack slips again, the successor late-proof packet inherits impacted rows and expiry budget. Otherwise the surfaces rebind to reviewed_current on the successor reviewed pack cut.

notes: The two stale-example detector events stay visible on the shiproom dashboard alongside this packet id; silent re-render of the guided step or generated example is forbidden.
